Xu Chao (Yansun) еҫҗи¶… (еҪҘеӯ«)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Chao (еҫҗи¶…), styledYansun (еҪҘеӯ«). Not in the book of Chen Shou. Had famous descendants. Xu Chao may not have existed in history. Xu Chao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
